content:
# Drill String Efficiency

**Summary**: A measure of the efficiency of the drilling system's ability to move the bit forward.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] minimized DSE by optimizing drilling parameters.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] Used to identify non-productive time and mechanical issues.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] Calculated from torque, weight on bit, and rotation speed.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The average decrease in DSE is almost more than 54% in all wells when using the model. ([[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017, p. 135]])
